---
title: "Teaching"
---

## University of Graz

| Course | Level and language | Term |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction to Management Accounting | Undergraduate, German | Summer term 2027 (scheduled) |
| Quantitative Research Methods 2 | Graduate, German/English | Summer term 2027 (scheduled) |
| Organization and Institutional Economics Seminar | Graduate, German/English | Winter term 2026/27 (scheduled) |
| Quantitative Research Methods 2 | Graduate, German/English | Winter term 2026/27 (scheduled) |
| Quantitative Research Methods 2 | Graduate, German/English | Summer term 2026 |
| Microeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Summer term 2024 |
| Game Theory | Graduate, English | Winter term 2023/24 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Summer term 2023 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Winter term 2022/23 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Summer term 2022 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Winter term 2021/22 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Summer term 2021 |
| Macroeconomics | Undergraduate, German | Winter term 2020/21 |

## Previous Teaching

- Vienna University of Technology: Graduate seminar and co-supervision of graduate and undergraduate theses, 2019--2020.
- University of Vienna: Teaching assistance and exam reviews in applied microeconomics and game theory, 2017--2018.
